name: late-night-drift
content:
// DJ OPUS - LATE NIGHT DRIFT
// Chill trance. Easy on the ears. Let it wash over you.
setcps(130/60/4)

// Just two sliders - keep it simple
let depth = slider(0.5, 0, 1, 0.01, "DEPTH")
let warmth = slider(0.4, 0, 0.7, 0.01, "WARMTH")

// Soft kick - not punchy, just presence
let kick = s("bd").bank("RolandTR808")
  .gain(0.7)
  .struct("x ~ x ~ x ~ x ~")

// Gentle closed hat
let hat = s("hh").bank("RolandTR808")
  .gain(0.2)
  .struct("~ x ~ x ~ x ~ x")
  .cutoff(2500)

// Deep sub bass - minimal movement
let sub = note("<a1 a1 e1 e1>".slow(4))
  .s("sine")
  .gain(0.5)
  .decay(1)
  .sustain(0.3)

// Warm pad - slow breathing filter
let pad = note("<[a2,e3,a3] [e2,b2,e3] [f2,c3,f3] [e2,b2,e3]>".slow(8))
  .s("sawtooth")
  .cutoff(perlin.range(300, 1500).slow(32))
  .resonance(4)
  .attack(2)
  .decay(3)
  .sustain(0.6)
  .release(3)
  .gain(warmth)
  .room(0.9)
  .size(0.95)

// Vocal texture - vowel filter, no samples needed
let voicePad = note("<[a3,c4] [e3,g3] [f3,a3] [e3,g3]>".slow(8))
  .s("sawtooth")
  .vowel("<a e i o u>".slow(16))
  .cutoff(perlin.range(400, 1800).slow(24))
  .resonance(6)
  .attack(1.5)
  .decay(2)
  .sustain(0.5)
  .release(2)
  .gain(depth)
  .room(0.95)
  .size(0.95)

// Melody - sparse, floating, lots of space
let melody = note("~ a4 ~ ~ e4 ~ ~ ~ ~ c5 ~ ~ ~ a4 ~ ~".slow(2))
  .s("triangle")
  .cutoff(1800)
  .decay(0.8)
  .sustain(0.05)
  .gain(0.25)
  .delay(0.5)
  .delaytime(3/4)
  .delayfeedback(0.5)
  .room(0.7)

stack(kick, hat, sub, pad, voicePad, melody)
